title: Open the workflow viewer from a deep-linked issue
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can land on a deep-linked issue in all work and open its workflow viewer from the status popover.

steps.description: Verify the workflow viewer modal is displayed
Verify the workflow diagram is displayed for the selected issue

title: Open the workflow viewer from an issue status
description: This test verifies that a user can open the workflow viewer modal from an issue’s status popover and see the workflow diagram for the selected issue type.

steps.description: Verify the workflow diagram is displayed
Verify the current status is highlighted

title: Show the workflow state chain for an issue
description: This test verifies that opening the workflow viewer displays the issue’s state sequence with transition arrows and verb labels.

steps.description: Verify the workflow state chain is displayed
Verify transition arrows and verb labels are displayed

title: Close the workflow viewer modal
description: This test verifies that a user can dismiss the workflow viewer modal after opening it from an issue status popover.

steps.description: Verify the workflow viewer modal is dismissed
Verify the issue detail panel remains open
